name: Solemnity of Saints Peter and Paul

sections.title: All Are Welcome
sections.author: Jesse Manibusan
sections.snippet: All are welcome in this place. Behold Love’s amazing grace. All are welcome! All are welcome! Bring your hopes, bring your dreams. Mercy flows and Love redeems! All are welcome! All belong!

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: The angel of the Lord will rescue those who fear him.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: You are Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church, and the gates of the netherworld shall not prevail against it.

sections.title: Ubi Caritas
sections.author: Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: Ubi caritas est vera, est vera: Deus ibi est, Deus ibi est.

sections.title: Sanctuary
sections.author: John W. Thompson
sections.snippet: Lord, prepare me to be a sanctuary; Pure and holy, tried and true; With thanksgiving, I'll be a living Sanctuary for You

sections.title: I Will Choose Christ
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: TI will choose Christ, I will choose love, I choose to serve. I give my heart, I give my life, I give my all to you.

sections.title: Be Not Afraid
sections.author: Bob Dufford SJ
sections.snippet: You shall cross the barren desert, but you shall not die of thirst. You shall wander far in safety though you do not know the way. You shall speak your words in foreign lands and all will understand. You shall see the face of God and live.

sections.title: God Has Chosen Me
sections.author: Bernadette Farrell
sections.snippet: All that we have seen, we will not hide away. We will hold it up as the light of day, a lamp of mercy meant to guide and lead carried to the least. We will show the world all that we have seen.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
